name: odoo-best-practices
description: Odoo development best practices skill pack — 130+ rules across 13 categories: ORM, security, views, OWL, testing, migration, API, data, i18n, deploy, and anti-pattern detection. Covers Odoo 14-19.
author: videcode

servers.name: odoo-analyzer
servers.description: Odoo static analysis: model/field/view/security queries, code checking, repository intelligence

tools.name: analyze_module
tools.description: Full Odoo addon analysis: models, views, security, dependencies, violations

tools.name: search_model
tools.description: Find Odoo model definition with fields, methods, inheritance chain

tools.name: check_repository
tools.description: Run AST rule engine + security audit on an Odoo addon

tools.name: explain_model
tools.description: Rich Odoo model explanation combining parsed data + domain knowledge
